overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Odyssey showing a character walking through the Sanctuary of Olympia in ancient Greece. The scene features stone architecture, ceremonial columns, purple festival banners, and NPCs populating a sunlit courtyard and processional way leading to a temple entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open temple courtyard with training area

events.description: exits stone colonnade into open sunlit courtyard
passes by NPCs practicing combat movements in the courtyard center

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the sanctuary courtyard, observing the training exercises and architecture

notable_agents.action: group of warriors practicing sword combat in the courtyard
individual walking with arms raised in a training pose

entered.detail: ornate stone pedestal with carved reliefs and flower offerings at its base
large stone fire bowl with active flames
mature olive tree providing shade over the courtyard
stone archway marking the exit of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a shaded colonnade looking out into a bright courtyard. As the camera moves forward, it passes a decorated stone pedestal on the left and approaches a group of NPCs practicing combat in the open stone-paved area. A lit brazier burns in the center while olive trees and stone buildings frame the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: ceremonial processional way with columns and banners

events.description: enters the column-lined processional path with hanging purple banners
passes close to a large ceremonial column on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking along the ceremonial processional way, passing between tall columns and under decorative banners

notable_agents.action: group of three robed figures walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: tall fluted stone column with decorative capital and purple banners attached
purple fabric banners suspended between columns with gold trim decorations
natural rock formation with sparse vegetation bordering the path
purple flowering plants arranged along the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a grand processional way lined with tall ceremonial columns draped with purple festival banners. The camera moves steadily forward along the stone pavement, passing groups of walking NPCs. Rocky terrain rises on the right while stone walls and flower beds line the left side of the path.

events.description: approaches the Sanctuary of Olympia temple entrance with large wooden doors
sun glare intensifies as camera faces the temple entrance directly

agents.ego_description: approaching the massive wooden doors of the Sanctuary of Olympia, moving toward the temple entrance

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing guard near the temple entrance

entered.detail: massive stone temple facade with Corinthian columns and triangular pediment
large vertical purple tapestries with gold embroidery hanging on the temple front
tall ancient wooden doors with metal reinforcements slightly ajar
sculpted stone lion figure guarding the left side of the entrance
blue fabric canopy structure visible to the right of the temple

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the Sanctuary of Olympia, with the camera moving toward the imposing temple entrance. Large purple banners hang from the stone facade, and massive wooden doors stand partially open. A stone lion statue guards the left approach while the sun creates a bright glare from behind the structure. The scene ends at the threshold of the temple entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded interior of a colonnade out into the grand, sun-drenched processional way of the Sanctuary of Olympia. It begins in the cool shade, moving past a decorated stone pedestal toward a bright courtyard where NPCs practice combat around a burning brazier and olive trees. As the camera exits the courtyard, the scene opens into a wide stone path lined with towering ceremonial columns and purple festival banners, passing groups of pedestrians between rocky terrain and manicured flower beds. The movement then shifts toward the imposing temple entrance, gliding past a stone lion statue as the sun creates a bright glare behind the architecture. Finally, the camera arrives at the threshold of the sanctuary, coming to a stop before the massive, partially open wooden doors.
